default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize content and technical setup for the upcoming "Vibe Marketing" workshop.](https://fathom.video/share/SPaNBjfSRwGAwQ2HfyQCmPztFXzYXfra?tab=summary&timestamp=1557.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Workshop Structure:** The workshop will contrast two marketing approaches: Ceci's product-market-fit-driven success with GrowthX's scalable, system-based methods.](https://fathom.video/share/SPaNBjfSRwGAwQ2HfyQCmPztFXzYXfra?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
  - **Core Demo:** GrowthX will demo its AI content pipeline, which uses an iterative eval-loop to generate high-quality content (e.g., achieving \#1 SEO ranking), showcasing a scalable alternative to PMF-driven growth.
  - [**Lovable's "Narrative Gap":** Ceci will frame Lovable's marketing challenge: balancing the platform's powerful potential with the significant user effort required to build advanced apps.](https://fathom.video/share/SPaNBjfSRwGAwQ2HfyQCmPztFXzYXfra?tab=summary&timestamp=2206.0)
  - [**Technical Setup:** A successful audio test confirmed Ceci's new mic is working well; the team will use a book stack to elevate Ceci's camera for better eye contact.](https://fathom.video/share/SPaNBjfSRwGAwQ2HfyQCmPztFXzYXfra?tab=summary&timestamp=2832.0)

## Topics

### Workshop Content & Structure

  - [**Audience Insights:** The agenda is informed by 250+ registrant survey responses, which prioritized topics like using Lovable, Vibe Marketing systems, and AI content.](https://fathom.video/share/SPaNBjfSRwGAwQ2HfyQCmPztFXzYXfra?tab=summary&timestamp=1579.0)
  - [**Presenter Framing:**](https://fathom.video/share/SPaNBjfSRwGAwQ2HfyQCmPztFXzYXfra?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
      - [**GrowthX Presenter:** Will define "Vibe Marketing" as a mental model (move fast, build in public, compound learning) and provide a scalable, system-based alternative to PMF-driven growth.](https://fathom.video/share/SPaNBjfSRwGAwQ2HfyQCmPztFXzYXfra?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
      - [**Ceci Stallsmith:** Will share Lovable's success story, acknowledging that PMF is a powerful but hard-to-replicate driver, and will introduce the GrowthX partnership to solve a team skill gap.](https://fathom.video/share/SPaNBjfSRwGAwQ2HfyQCmPztFXzYXfra?tab=summary&timestamp=2206.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Media-First Model:** GrowthX's community, which crossed $50k ARR with \~200 paying customers, demonstrates a self-funding media-first strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/SPaNBjfSRwGAwQ2HfyQCmPztFXzYXfra?tab=summary&timestamp=1946.0)
      - [**Front-end offer:** The community ($500/year).](https://fathom.video/share/SPaNBjfSRwGAwQ2HfyQCmPztFXzYXfra?tab=summary&timestamp=2071.0)
      - [**Back-end offer:** High-ticket services ($300k/year).](https://fathom.video/share/SPaNBjfSRwGAwQ2HfyQCmPztFXzYXfra?tab=summary&timestamp=2056.0)
      - [**Goal:** Invest $1M, then use revenue to fund ongoing growth.](https://fathom.video/share/SPaNBjfSRwGAwQ2HfyQCmPztFXzYXfra?tab=summary&timestamp=2012.0)

### AI Content Pipeline Demo

  - [**Core Function:** An AI pipeline that generates content via an iterative eval-loop, planning improvements over multiple steps.](https://fathom.video/share/SPaNBjfSRwGAwQ2HfyQCmPztFXzYXfra?tab=summary&timestamp=2145.0)
  - **Example:** A single draft required 10 iterations to achieve a \#1 SEO ranking for "Lovable vs. client."
  - [**Key Insight:** High-quality inputs are essential for high-quality outputs. The demo will show how to improve AI results by using structured prompts and templates.](https://fathom.video/share/SPaNBjfSRwGAwQ2HfyQCmPztFXzYXfra?tab=summary&timestamp=3081.0)

### Lovable Template Strategy

  - [**Problem:** Many users need inspiration and a starting point for building on Lovable.](https://fathom.video/share/SPaNBjfSRwGAwQ2HfyQCmPztFXzYXfra?tab=summary&timestamp=3128.0)
  - [**Solution:** AI-generated templates serve as a key growth lever by providing:](https://fathom.video/share/SPaNBjfSRwGAwQ2HfyQCmPztFXzYXfra?tab=summary&timestamp=3128.0)
      - [Faster time-to-value for users.](https://fathom.video/share/SPaNBjfSRwGAwQ2HfyQCmPztFXzYXfra?tab=summary&timestamp=3161.0)
      - [SEO benefits for template-related searches.](https://fathom.video/share/SPaNBjfSRwGAwQ2HfyQCmPztFXzYXfra?tab=summary&timestamp=3144.0)
  - [**Process:** Jason Gong will detail the technical process for scaling high-quality template creation.](https://fathom.video/share/SPaNBjfSRwGAwQ2HfyQCmPztFXzYXfra?tab=summary&timestamp=3205.0)

### Technical Setup

  - [**Platform:** Zoom Webinar.](https://fathom.video/share/SPaNBjfSRwGAwQ2HfyQCmPztFXzYXfra?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [**Audio:** Ceci's new mic setup was confirmed to have excellent sound quality.](https://fathom.video/share/SPaNBjfSRwGAwQ2HfyQCmPztFXzYXfra?tab=summary&timestamp=2832.0)
  - [**Video:** To improve eye contact, Ceci will use a book stack to elevate the camera, aligning it with the screen.](https://fathom.video/share/SPaNBjfSRwGAwQ2HfyQCmPztFXzYXfra?tab=summary&timestamp=2846.0)
  - [**Production:** Ceci's producer, Alessandra, is managing the on-site setup in Rome.](https://fathom.video/share/SPaNBjfSRwGAwQ2HfyQCmPztFXzYXfra?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Ceci Stallsmith:**](https://fathom.video/share/SPaNBjfSRwGAwQ2HfyQCmPztFXzYXfra?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
      - [Add Zoom help/features slide.](https://fathom.video/share/SPaNBjfSRwGAwQ2HfyQCmPztFXzYXfra?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
      - [Send intro slide to Marcel for the waiting room.](https://fathom.video/share/SPaNBjfSRwGAwQ2HfyQCmPztFXzYXfra?tab=summary&timestamp=2647.0)
      - [Use book stack to elevate camera for the workshop.](https://fathom.video/share/SPaNBjfSRwGAwQ2HfyQCmPztFXzYXfra?tab=summary&timestamp=2846.0)
  - [**GrowthX Presenter:**](https://fathom.video/share/SPaNBjfSRwGAwQ2HfyQCmPztFXzYXfra?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
      - [Send workshop Zoom link to Ceci.](https://fathom.video/share/SPaNBjfSRwGAwQ2HfyQCmPztFXzYXfra?tab=summary&timestamp=3282.0)
      - [Prepare AI pipeline demo.](https://fathom.video/share/SPaNBjfSRwGAwQ2HfyQCmPztFXzYXfra?tab=summary&timestamp=2091.0)
  - [**Jason Gong:**](https://fathom.video/share/SPaNBjfSRwGAwQ2HfyQCmPztFXzYXfra?tab=summary&timestamp=3205.0)
      - [Prepare presentation on the template creation process.](https://fathom.video/share/SPaNBjfSRwGAwQ2HfyQCmPztFXzYXfra?tab=summary&timestamp=3205.0)

action_items.description: Add Zoom webinar help/features slide to deck
Schedule session w/ Marcel re: new media team
Email Marcel waiting-room asset; then Marcel add to Zoom waiting room if time
Email Ceci Luma link for next session
